query: Identify the designated large parking area and specify its location within the scene (e.g., top-right, bottom-left, center). Then, assess its current occupancy level by categorizing it as: empty, nearly empty, moderately occupied, nearly full, or completely full.
final_answer: The designated large parking area is located at the bottom of the scene, just below the cluster of buildings with red and gray rooftops. It is nearly full, with only a few vacant spaces remaining, primarily along the southwest edge.

evaluation.question: Is the designated large parking area located at the bottom of the scene?
Is the occupancy level of the parking area categorized as nearly full?
